TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == badisusu' == ŤĎ°ŤźĄ calaycay ku heci nu badisusu' ni Namuh. asu' ku heci nu badisusu'. siwkay nu badisusu' badisusu' u nipaluma nu kakaenen. u mapelu' ku papah a kilang-masay a nipaluma. yadah ku heci, asu' mukan tu heci nu badisusu'. naayaw a badisusu' cilemin, ayzaay a badisusu' nupaluma'an nu malukay, sicedam tu. uzumaay a sasahicaan sa u taneng palidung. kya masay mukacaw tu cuket tayza takalaway, sisa silidung tu. ayzasa mananam tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw musakamu tu "putau" satu, u Hulam a kamu kuyza. na u tademaw paluma' tu badisusu' i ayaw 6000-8000 a mihcan, i Capi-wali subal . tinaku a kamu badisusu'ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / calaycay ku heci nu badisusu' ni Namuh. asu' ku heci nu badisusu'. mibadisusu'śé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / mibadisusu' kaku tu pituway a bulad nu mihecaan. mibadisusu'ayśé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁöĄ / awawan naku ku mibadisusu'ay a mibadisusu' tu nu maku. pibadisusu'iŚéĽśé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / pibadisusu'i kisu Bunuk aci Sayun! sibadisusu'śúČŤĎ°ŤźĄÔľõśúČÁ®ģŤĎ°ŤźĄ / sibadisusu' ci Benel i buyu'. sibadisusu'ay / sibadisusu'ay ku kakitaan nu Sakul. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika . This article is about the fruits of the genus Vitis. For the European grapevine, see Vitis vinifera. For other uses, see Grape (disambiguation). A grape is a fruit, botanically a berry, of the deciduous woody vines of the flowering plant genus Vitis. Grapes can be eaten fresh as table grapes or they can be used for making wine, jam, juice, jelly, grape seed extract, raisins, vinegar, and grape seed oil. Grapes are a non-climacteric type of fruit, generally occurring in clusters.
S.PHON: == badisusu Ē~ ° == ** ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ ° ni namuńß. asu Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. siwkaj nu badisusu Ē~ ° badisusu Ē~ ° u nipar~…ĺuma nu kaka…ôn…ôn. u map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku papańß a kir~…ĺaŇč-masaj a nipar~…ĺuma. jadańß ku ńß…ô ¶i, asu Ē~ ° mukan tu ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. naajaw a badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin, ajzaaj a badisusu Ē~ ° nupar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mar~…ĺukaj, si ¶…ôdam tu. uzumaaj a sasańßi ¶aan sa u tan…ôŇč par~…ĺiduŇč. kja masaj muka ¶aw tu ¶uk…ôt tajza takar~…ĺawaj, sisa sir~…ĺiduŇč tu. ajzasa mananam tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw musakamu tu "putau" satu, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu kujza. na u tad…ômaw par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu badisusu Ē~ ° i ajaw ****-**** a mińß ¶an, i ¶api-war~…ĺi subar~…ĺ . tinaku a kamu badisusu Ē~ °** / ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ ° ni namuńß. asu Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. mibadisusu Ē~ °*** / mibadisusu Ē~ ° kaku tu pituwaj a bur~…ĺad nu mińß…ô ¶aan. mibadisusu Ē~ °aj**** / awawan naku ku mibadisusu Ē~ °aj a mibadisusu Ē~ ° tu nu maku. pibadisusu Ē~ °i**** / pibadisusu Ē~ °i kisu bunuk a ¶i sajun! sibadisusu Ē~ °******** / sibadisusu Ē~ ° ¶i b…ôn…ôr~…ĺ i buju Ē~ °. sibadisusu Ē~ °aj / sibadisusu Ē~ °aj ku kakitaan nu sakur~…ĺ. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika . tńßis arti ¶r~…ĺ…ô is about tńß…ô fruits of tńß…ô g…ônus *itis. for tńß…ô …ôurop…ôan grap…ô*in…ô, s…ô…ô *itis *inif…ôra. for otńß…ôr us…ôs, s…ô…ô grap…ô (disambiguation). a grap…ô is a fruit, botani ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a b…ôrrj, of tńß…ô d…ô ¶iduous woodj *in…ôs of tńß…ô fr~…ĺow…ôriŇč pr~…ĺant g…ônus *itis. grap…ôs ¶an b…ô …ôat…ôn fr…ôsńß as tabr~…ĺ…ô grap…ôs or tńß…ô ¶an b…ô us…ôd for makiŇč win…ô, jam, jui ¶…ô, j…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺj, grap…ô s…ô…ôd …ô*tra ¶t, raisins, *in…ôgar, and grap…ô s…ô…ôd oir~…ĺ. grap…ôs ar…ô a non- ¶r~…ĺima ¶t…ôri ¶ tjp…ô of fruit, g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj o ¶ ¶urriŇč in ¶r~…ĺust…ôrs.
S.FORM: == badisusu' == ŤĎ°ŤźĄ calaycay ku heci nu badisusu' ni Namuh. asu' ku heci nu badisusu'. siwkay nu badisusu' badisusu' u nipaluma nu kakaenen. u mapelu' ku papah a kilang-masay a nipaluma. yadah ku heci, asu' mukan tu heci nu badisusu'. naayaw a badisusu' cilemin, ayzaay a badisusu' nupaluma'an nu malukay, sicedam tu. uzumaay a sasahicaan sa u taneng palidung. kya masay mukacaw tu cuket tayza takalaway, sisa silidung tu. ayzasa mananam tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw musakamu tu "putau" satu, u Hulam a kamu kuyza. na u tademaw paluma' tu badisusu' i ayaw 6000-8000 a mihcan, i Capi-wali subal . tinaku a kamu badisusu'ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / calaycay ku heci nu badisusu' ni Namuh. asu' ku heci nu badisusu'. mibadisusu'śé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / mibadisusu' kaku tu pituway a bulad nu mihecaan. mibadisusu'ayśé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁöĄ / awawan naku ku mibadisusu'ay a mibadisusu' tu nu maku. pibadisusu'iŚéĽśé°ŤĎ°ŤźĄ / pibadisusu'i kisu Bunuk aci Sayun! sibadisusu'śúČŤĎ°ŤźĄÔľõśúČÁ®ģŤĎ°ŤźĄ / sibadisusu' ci Benel i buyu'. sibadisusu'ay / sibadisusu'ay ku kakitaan nu Sakul. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika . This article is about the fruits of the genus Vitis. For the European grapevine, see Vitis vinifera. For other uses, see Grape (disambiguation). A grape is a fruit, botanically a berry, of the deciduous woody vines of the flowering plant genus Vitis. Grapes can be eaten fresh as table grapes or they can be used for making wine, jam, juice, jelly, grape seed extract, raisins, vinegar, and grape seed oil. Grapes are a non-climacteric type of fruit, generally occurring in clusters.
S.PHON: == badisusu Ē~ ° == ** ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ ° ni namuńß. asu Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. siwkaj nu badisusu Ē~ ° badisusu Ē~ ° u nipar~…ĺuma nu kaka…ôn…ôn. u map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku papańß a kir~…ĺaŇč-masaj a nipar~…ĺuma. jadańß ku ńß…ô ¶i, asu Ē~ ° mukan tu ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. naajaw a badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin, ajzaaj a badisusu Ē~ ° nupar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mar~…ĺukaj, si ¶…ôdam tu. uzumaaj a sasańßi ¶aan sa u tan…ôŇč par~…ĺiduŇč. kja masaj muka ¶aw tu ¶uk…ôt tajza takar~…ĺawaj, sisa sir~…ĺiduŇč tu. ajzasa mananam tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw musakamu tu "putau" satu, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu kujza. na u tad…ômaw par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu badisusu Ē~ ° i ajaw ****-**** a mińß ¶an, i ¶api-war~…ĺi subar~…ĺ . tinaku a kamu badisusu Ē~ °** / ¶ar~…ĺaj ¶aj ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ ° ni namuńß. asu Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nu badisusu Ē~ °. mibadisusu Ē~ °*** / mibadisusu Ē~ ° kaku tu pituwaj a bur~…ĺad nu mińß…ô ¶aan. mibadisusu Ē~ °aj**** / awawan naku ku mibadisusu Ē~ °aj a mibadisusu Ē~ ° tu nu maku. pibadisusu Ē~ °i**** / pibadisusu Ē~ °i kisu bunuk a ¶i sajun! sibadisusu Ē~ °******** / sibadisusu Ē~ ° ¶i b…ôn…ôr~…ĺ i buju Ē~ °. sibadisusu Ē~ °aj / sibadisusu Ē~ °aj ku kakitaan nu sakur~…ĺ. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika . tńßis arti ¶r~…ĺ…ô is about tńß…ô fruits of tńß…ô g…ônus *itis. for tńß…ô …ôurop…ôan grap…ô*in…ô, s…ô…ô *itis *inif…ôra. for otńß…ôr us…ôs, s…ô…ô grap…ô (disambiguation). a grap…ô is a fruit, botani ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj a b…ôrrj, of tńß…ô d…ô ¶iduous woodj *in…ôs of tńß…ô fr~…ĺow…ôriŇč pr~…ĺant g…ônus *itis. grap…ôs ¶an b…ô …ôat…ôn fr…ôsńß as tabr~…ĺ…ô grap…ôs or tńß…ô ¶an b…ô us…ôd for makiŇč win…ô, jam, jui ¶…ô, j…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺj, grap…ô s…ô…ôd …ô*tra ¶t, raisins, *in…ôgar, and grap…ô s…ô…ôd oir~…ĺ. grap…ôs ar…ô a non- ¶r~…ĺima ¶t…ôri ¶ tjp…ô of fruit, g…ôn…ôrar~…ĺr~…ĺj o ¶ ¶urriŇč in ¶r~…ĺust…ôrs.
